product_page.title_descriptor: Mesh Fabric for Safety Jackets Non Neon Colors
product_page.page_title: Mesh Fabric for Safety Jackets Non Neon Colors - ArNeo Color File - Ariteks
description_blocks: ArNeo Color File is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted mesh fabric.
It used for jackets with reflective strips.
The mesh structure is usefull for hot climates working conditions.

technical_documents.label: >> ArNeo Color File Data Sheet
technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 120 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Color File Data Sheet Certificates ASTM E 2149 ASTM E 2149, 30 wash ISO 105 C06 ISO 105 E04 ISO 105 X12 ISO 1833 ISO 6330 ISO 16373-2 Knitting TS 251 Metot 6

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.

ArNeo Color File is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted mesh fabric. It used for jackets with reflective strips. The mesh structure is usefull for hot climates working conditions. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 120 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Color File Data Sheet Certificates ASTM E 2149 ASTM E 2149, 30 wash ISO 105 C06 ISO 105 E04 ISO 105 X12 ISO 1833 ISO 6330 ISO 16373-2 Knitting TS 251 Metot 6

ArNeo Color File is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted mesh fabric.
It used for jackets with reflective strips.
The mesh structure is usefull for hot climates working conditions.
